rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies that line 73's `simp [Set.mem_preimage, eq_comm, map_proj]` uses the full default simp set rather than `simp only`, making the closure brittle to simp-set changes -- a real proof-quality issue in Mathlib-style Lean 4 that maintainers routinely require be fixed. Acting on Review 2 produces a more robust proof; Review 1's blanket approval leaves this brittleness in place.
